office_does: The treasurer collects revenue, manages county funds, distributes money to local agencies, and administers foreclosure and excise-tax functions.
race_blurb: Incumbent Shawn Hill faces former county commissioner Wes Cormier.

candidates.summary: Hill is the incumbent treasurer and former chief deputy treasurer.
highlights: Serves as treasurer after chief-deputy experience [S1][S2][S3].

experience.basis: Incumbency and chief-deputy service provide an extensive office record.

candidates.summary: Cormier is a former county commissioner and assessor-office appraiser emphasizing controls, efficiency, access, accurate distributions, and stewardship.
highlights: Supports internal controls and taxpayer-dollar stewardship [S2][S3].

spending.basis: Internal controls and stewardship supply an oversight direction.

experience.basis: Eight years as commissioner plus assessor-office experience provide a substantial county record.
